news.headline: ASML to reap benefits from demand from Low-NA EUV adoption
news.summary: Investing.com -- Semiconductor equipment giant ASML is expected to benefit more from strong demand for existing EUV lithography systems than from the industry’s next-generation High-NA technology over the next several years, according to a new research report from BofA Securities.
